positive: A whimsical, stylized portrait of a majestic space sloth hanging from a bioluminescent jungle vine, surrounded by floating nebula dust and exotic, abstract planetary rings. The sloth has a serene, slightly cheeky expression. Composition should feature a central, balanced composition with strong silhouettes and high contrast. Style: Cosmic Retro-Futurism, reminiscent of Mid-Century modern sci-fi illustration mixed with ethereal fantasy art. Color Palette: Deep indigo, vibrant magenta, teal, and glowing gold highlights. Lighting: Dramatic, soft glowing edge lighting (rim lighting) emphasizing the sloth's fluff and the glow of the flora. Print Details: Clean lines, vector-art quality, highly detailed textures without being cluttered, suitable for a single, centralized apparel print. Minimalist background elements that enhance the main subject. Aspect Ratio: Square.
